name: animation_kdna_cluster
purpose: Open-source KDNA cluster for animation, motion design, GSAP, Motion Canvas, frontend motion systems, AI animation workflows, and review judgment.
conflict_resolution: accessibility and performance override decorative ambition
domain-specific implementation guidance overrides generic motion taste
when uncertain, reduce simultaneous motion and increase clarity
validation_expectations: Each domain folder uses lowercase snake_case.
Each complete domain contains exactly the six standard KDNA files.
Each file includes meta.version, meta.domain, meta.created, meta.purpose, and meta.load_condition.
IDs should be unique inside each file and cross-file references should remain meaningful.
